subject: Define structured context schema and update orchestration.md merge procedures
description:
Define the 6-section structured context schema for `execution_context.md` and per-task `context-task-{id}.md` files. Update `claude/sdd-tools/references/orchestration.md` with section-based merge procedures.

**What to implement:**

1. Define the 6 fixed section headers for execution_context.md:
   - `## Project Setup` — Package manager, runtime, frameworks, build tools
   - `## File Patterns` — Test file patterns, component patterns, API route patterns
   - `## Conventions` — Import style, error handling, state management, naming
   - `## Key Decisions` — Choices made during execution with task references
   - `## Known Issues` — Problems encountered, workarounds, gotchas
   - `## Task History` — Compact log: task ID, name, status, key contribution

2. Define per-task context-task-{id}.md format using same 6 section headers (empty sections omitted)

3. Update orchestration.md merge procedures:
   - Split on `## ` markers as merge anchors
   - Append entries under matching section headers
   - Deduplicate entries within sections during merge
   - Compaction at 10+ entries per section: summarize older entries into paragraph
   - Initial execution_context.md created with all 6 headers and empty content

**Files to modify:**
- `claude/sdd-tools/references/orchestration.md` (~611 lines)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] execution_context.md template defined with 6 section headers and HTML comments
- [ ] Per-task context-task-{id}.md format defined with same 6 headers
- [ ] Orchestrator merge procedure uses section headers as merge anchors
- [ ] Entries appended under matching section headers during merge
- [ ] Duplicate entries within a section are deduplicated during merge

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Empty sections in per-task files are omitted by agents (documented as convention)
- [ ] Content outside any section header is handled gracefully during merge
- [ ] Merge handles context files with only some sections present

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Malformed context file (missing all headers) logged as warning, content placed under `## Key Decisions`

_Performance:_
- [ ] Compaction triggered at 10+ entries per section to prevent unbounded growth

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Verify template renders correctly as markdown
• Manual: Verify merge procedure instructions are clear and unambiguous
• Integration: Validated during end-to-end execution session (Task 15)

Source: internal/specs/execute-tasks-hardening-SPEC.md Section 5.7
